title: Daewoo Deep Fill Sandwich Toaster 900W, Non-Stick Toastie Maker with Locking Clip, Dual Indicator Lights, Sandwich Press for Crispy Sealed Toasties – Easy Clean Compact Design
features: Deep Fill Design for Bigger Bites – Create generously filled toasted sandwiches with ease. The extra-deep non-stick plates seal and toast to perfection, ideal for cheese, ham, and veggie lovers
900W Fast Heating Power – Toast your sandwich in just minutes with powerful 900W performance and automatic temperature control. Enjoy hot, golden sandwiches in no time
Safe and User-Friendly Operation – Features cool-touch handle, locking clip, and anti-slip base. Power and ready indicator lights let you know exactly when to cook
Easy to Clean Non-Stick Plates – The sandwich maker’s non-stick coating ensures effortless food release and quick clean-up, just wipe and store
Compact Storage with Cord Wrap – Smart space-saving design includes cord storage and upright stand feature, perfect for small kitchens or student accommodations

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Deep Fill Cooking Plates, Non-Stick, Easy Clean-Up, 900W, Dual Indicator Lights, Locking Clip Mechanism, Cool-Touch Upper Handle, Compact and Upright Storage Design, Stable & Safe Operation - Anti-slip base
